_comment: Shadow audit-room Three.js runtime inventory (demos/replay/3d/). Static-analysis derived (read-only), evidence-backed. Single static DEMO_BUNDLE (12 events) — no multi-story switching exists; the rebuild path is annotate->layout().
labels: canvas-textured PlaneGeometry meshes (CanvasTexture @ PX_PER_UNIT=900); NOT sprites/troika/CSS2D; card faces reused via repaint(), all other makeText labels recreated per update; CJK font in fallback stack (PingFang SC) but demo content is ASCII
draw_calls_estimate: 75-90 flat; 150-180 SBS (scene rendered twice L/R); no instancing/merging
leak_sites: scene.js:213-214 layout() card teardown (remove without dispose)
per_frame_alloc: scene.js:428 new THREE.Vector3() per card per frame (GC churn, minor)
